requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer, CNPJ, and Market-Access Logistics
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口商、CNPJ 与市场准入物流
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口商、CNPJ 與市場准入物流

summary.en: Brazil requires an in-country importer holding a valid CNPJ to act as the responsible economic operator, hold the INMETRO certification or registration, and handle customs clearance. Energy and efficiency labelling may apply through PBE and PROCEL, inland transport of goods and any dangerous-goods batteries is regulated by ANTT, and shipments typically enter via ports such as Santos or Paranaguá.
summary.zh: 巴西要求持有有效 CNPJ 的在地进口商作为责任经济经营者，持有 INMETRO 认证或登记并办理清关。能源与能效标签可经 PBE 与 PROCEL 适用，货物的内陆运输及任何危险品电池由 ANTT 监管，货物通常经 Santos 或 Paranaguá 等港口入境。
summary.zht: 巴西要求持有有效 CNPJ 的在地進口商作為責任經濟經營者，持有 INMETRO 認證或登記並辦理清關。能源與能效標籤可經 PBE 與 PROCEL 適用，貨物的內陸運輸及任何危險品電池由 ANTT 監管，貨物通常經 Santos 或 Paranaguá 等港口入境。

standards_or_laws: In-country importer registered with a CNPJ as the responsible economic operator
INMETRO conformity certification or registration held by the importer for compulsory product families
PBE and PROCEL energy and efficiency labelling where applicable
ANTT regulation for inland and dangerous-goods transport

summary.en: Chinese exporters often sell ex-works or FOB and treat the buyer as merely a distributor, relying on GB/T product documentation and a China business licence. Brazil instead places legal product responsibility on a local importer holding the CNPJ and the INMETRO certification, not on the Chinese manufacturer alone.
summary.zh: 中国出口商常以出厂价或 FOB 销售，将买方仅视为经销商，依赖 GB/T 产品文件和中国营业执照。巴西则将产品法律责任置于持有 CNPJ 与 INMETRO 认证的本地进口商，而不仅是中国制造商。
summary.zht: 中國出口商常以出廠價或 FOB 銷售，將買方僅視為經銷商，依賴 GB/T 產品文件和中國營業執照。巴西則將產品法律責任置於持有 CNPJ 與 INMETRO 認證的本地進口商，而不僅是中國製造商。

standards_or_laws: China business licence and GB/T product documentation
Standard FOB or ex-works export arrangement without an appointed in-country responsible operator

gap.en: Without an appointed importer holding a CNPJ and the INMETRO certification, the goods cannot be lawfully cleared or sold, regardless of factory quality. Chinese exporters must arrange the importer of record early, ensure the INMETRO certificate is held in Brazil, confirm any PBE and PROCEL labelling, and plan ANTT-compliant inland transport from Santos or Paranaguá.
gap.zh: 若无持有 CNPJ 与 INMETRO 认证的指定进口商，无论工厂质量如何，货物均无法合法清关或销售。中国出口商须尽早安排进口记录方，确保 INMETRO 证书在巴西持有，确认任何 PBE 与 PROCEL 标签，并规划自 Santos 或 Paranaguá 起的符合 ANTT 的内陆运输。
gap.zht: 若無持有 CNPJ 與 INMETRO 認證的指定進口商，無論工廠品質如何，貨物均無法合法清關或銷售。中國出口商須儘早安排進口記錄方，確保 INMETRO 證書在巴西持有，確認任何 PBE 與 PROCEL 標籤，並規劃自 Santos 或 Paranaguá 起的符合 ANTT 的內陸運輸。

target.en: Mandatory: an in-country importer with a CNPJ and the corresponding INMETRO certification or registration is a legal precondition for customs clearance and sale; PBE and PROCEL labelling and ANTT transport rules apply where relevant.
target.zh: 强制：持有 CNPJ 及相应 INMETRO 认证或登记的在地进口商是清关与销售的法定前提；PBE 与 PROCEL 标签及 ANTT 运输规则在相关情形下适用。
target.zht: 強制：持有 CNPJ 及相應 INMETRO 認證或登記的在地進口商是清關與銷售的法定前提；PBE 與 PROCEL 標籤及 ANTT 運輸規則在相關情形下適用。

cn.en: China domestic baseline relies on a China business licence and GB/T documentation, which does not establish a Brazilian responsible importer.
cn.zh: 中国国内基线依赖中国营业执照与 GB/T 文件，无法确立巴西的责任进口商。
cn.zht: 中國國內基線依賴中國營業執照與 GB/T 文件，無法確立巴西的責任進口商。

source.publisher: INMETRO (Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Brazil-ready until an in-country importer with a CNPJ holds the INMETRO certification or registration, with PBE and PROCEL labelling and ANTT transport addressed; a China business licence and GB/T file alone do not enable market access.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在持有 CNPJ 的在地进口商持有 INMETRO 认证或登记，并处理 PBE 与 PROCEL 标签及 ANTT 运输之前，不能视为巴西就绪；仅凭中国营业执照与 GB/T 文件无法实现市场准入。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在持有 CNPJ 的在地進口商持有 INMETRO 認證或登記，並處理 PBE 與 PROCEL 標籤及 ANTT 運輸之前，不能視為巴西就緒；僅憑中國營業執照與 GB/T 文件無法實現市場准入。
